name: Nord-Trøndelag (Norway, 1957–2017)
description: A white field charged with a stylised gold four-armed Greek cross with bell-shaped arms.
history: Granted to Nord-Trondelag county on 25 January 1957. The county was abolished on 1 January 2018 when it was merged with Sor-Trondelag into the (re-united) Trondelag county.

features.symbolism: drawn from a Viking Age find in the region; symbolises the historical and cultural heritage of inner Trondelag
